raw_consumer_statement: XXXX XX/XX/year> my American Express card was charged over {$5000.00} fraudulently. My card was linked to XXXX. My XXXX account was hacked. AE has promised me over 8 times to call me and address this. No calls. Meanwhile I am accruing interest and having to make payments to protect my credit score. I am furious with AE. This was fraud and they wont address this
